translated: Jesus and his mother were there, he was invited to a big house to eat with them. The crowd and his disciples were there, and there was not enough beer for them to drink.

translated: And Jesus said to them, "The harvest is plentiful but the workers are few, pray therefore the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest."

text: 'Lɔ lɛ a bʊ̃bie a jaa pɔ bʊ̃bile tɩchɛ 'lɔ wa nʊ̃ɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ma ɩ a tɩɩr a jaa pɔ tɩkpɛ̃ɛ, ka lubil ma 'yɔ̃ɔ choor a wʊ ju.”
translated: They said that the rabbit and the elephant were friends, they said that they would go and take a walk together, and the rabbit's wife prepared food for them to eat.

text: A yɩn Kapenahum dẽme, ban 'mɔɔ yɩn don saaju bɩɩ? Kai, ban suun yɩn a kpĩisɩ tẽe. Ala ɩ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ na tʊ̃ a yɩ pɔ mɩ ta tʊ̃n a Sodom pɔ, a tẽe anyãna naa chɛnɛ na wa tɔ dɩna.
translated: And you, Capernaum, will you be lifted to the heavens? No, you will go down to Hades. For if the miracles that were performed in you had been performed in Sodom, it would have remained to this day.

text: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ yɔɔ nɩ nɩtorsɩ yɔɔ ta bʊɔrɔ na ɩka ba nyɛ bon 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ tɩchɛ baa nyɛ ɛ, na ba ta wõ bon 'lɔ yɩn wõ tɩchɛ baa tʊ̃ɔ wõ ɛ.
translated: The people of the village went to Naangmin's house to work, and they worked and worked but couldn't finish, and they said let's rest and rest and then we'll finish, but they rested and rested and couldn't finish.

ref: Everyone who has something will be given more, and they will have more than enough. But everything will be taken from those who don't have anything.
text: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara yɔɔ, ban kʊ wʊn yɔɔ pʊɔ ka ba tara yɔɔ tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba tara bon jaa ɛ, a bãlãa 'lɔ wʊn tara gba ban faan yin a wʊ sɛ̃.
translated: The man's wife went to the farm, but she didn't go to the farm to work, she went to the farm to look for her husband, and her husband was sitting on the farm doing nothing, and his wife saw him sitting there doing nothing.

ref: So the chief priests met with the leaders and decided to bribe the soldiers with a lot of money.
text: A bɔɔrlo nãa nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛrɛ na wa lɔ̃ɔ taa, ba guor taa de libiyɔɔ kʊ a sojasɩ
translated: The man and his wife went to the bush, but the war came and the soldiers killed him

ref: The angel said, “Get up and take the child and his mother back to Israel. The people who wanted to kill him are now dead.”
text: “Vaa ir 'mɔɔ a bie nɩ a wʊ ma na fʊ chiin a Isɩral wɛr pɔ, a bala na dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ a bie kʊfʊ kpi naa.”
translated: They said, "We have a father, an old man, in Israel, and we have a younger brother, the child of his old age, and his brother is dead."

ref: Everyone who asks will receive. Everyone who searches will find. And the door will be opened for everyone who knocks.
text: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sʊɔr na nyɛ naa, ka a 'lɔ mɩ na yɔbɔ nyɛ, ka a pãn mɩ yuo kʊ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kpoor.
